      About this item

      • POWERFUL ANTI-AGEING FORMULATION: This cream features our highest concentration of Niacinamide at 99% purity, along with antioxidant Vitamin E to help combat the visible signs of ageing
      • IMMEDIATE RESULTS: Experience instant long-lasting hydration. In just one day, 93% of users reported smoother-feeling skin.In 14 days skin looks rejuvanated and visibly more even
      • SPF 30 SOLASHEER TECHNOLOGY: Protect your skin from UV rays, the #1 cause of premature ageing, with this lightweight, non-greasy cream. Enjoy SPF30 sun protection without the white cast or sticky residue
      • 24H HYDRATION: Enriched with glycerin to help the skin retain moisture and stay soft, this cream delivers long-lasting hydration
      • DERMATOLOGIST TESTED: this face cream is dermatologist approved by the Skin Health Alliance to defy the visible signs of ageing
      • BEAUTIFUL REFILLABLE GLASS JAR: once your jar is empty, pop out the empty pod and pop in an Olay POP refill
      › See more product details

      Important information

      Ingredients:

      Aqua, Octocrylene, Zea Mays Starch, Homosalate, Niacinamide, Glycerin, Ethylhexyl Salicylate, Butyl Methoxydibenzoylmethane, Dimethicone, Tocopheryl Acetate, Panthenol, Caprylyl Glycol, Dimethiconol, Cetearyl Glucoside, Cetearyl Alcohol, Stearic Acid, Palmitic Acid, Stearyl Alcohol, Cetyl Alcohol, Behenyl Alcohol, Arachidyl Alcohol, Disodium EDTA, PEG-100 Stearate, 1.2-Hexanediol, Sodium Polyacrylate Starch, Phenoxyethanol, Parfum

      Directions:

      How to use: smooth evenly over cleansed face and neck. Apply minimum once a day, in the morning.

      Product description

      Product Description

      Defy the 10 signs of aging with Olay Regenerist Niacinamide SPF30 moisturiser! Our advanced active firming day moisturiser with SPF 30 delivers transformative (visible) skin results instantly and overtime. It is crafted with Niacinamide at 99% purity, penetrating up to 10 layers deep into skin’s surface and Vitamin E, a proven antioxidant known to combat free-radical damage and help keep skin looking youthful. Experience the power of 24-hour hydration, keeping your skin moisturized throughout the day. In just one day, 93% women noticed smoother skin. Over 14 days, experience a firmer complexion and reduced fine lines. Say goodbye to heavy, greasy face creams and welcome our advanced Olay SolaSheer SPF30 technology: an effective broad-spectrum UVA and UVB protection, shielding your skin from harmful rays, that absorbs effortlessly for a lightweight, non-greasy, non-sticky feel on skin. Our formula is now dermatologist approved by the Skin Health Alliance for its effectiveness in defying visible signs of skin ageing. Upgrade your skincare Routine with our beautiful (and more sustainable) Refillable Glass Jar! Effortlessly pop in and pop out the refillable pods for a delightful and innovative skincare experience.

      Ingredients

      Aqua, Octocrylene, Zea Mays Starch, Homosalate, Niacinamide, Glycerin, Ethylhexyl Salicylate, Butyl Methoxydibenzoylmethane, Dimethicone, Tocopheryl Acetate, Panthenol, Caprylyl Glycol, Dimethiconol, Cetearyl Glucoside, Cetearyl Alcohol, Stearic Acid, Palmitic Acid, Stearyl Alcohol, Cetyl Alcohol, Behenyl Alcohol, Arachidyl Alcohol, Disodium EDTA, PEG-100 Stearate, 1.2-Hexanediol, Sodium Polyacrylate Starch, Phenoxyethanol, Parfum

      Directions

      How to use: smooth evenly over cleansed face and neck. Apply minimum once a day, in the morning.

      Olay presents​

      1. Olay presents​

        Olay Retinol 24, with proven potency​


        Did you know? If your retinol moisturiser changes color, it may mean the retinol it contains it’s not stable and that could affect its potency. We have put Olay Retinol24 to the test, to show how it keeps its colour, which means it keeps its potency and efficacy over time.

            How customer reviews and ratings work

            Customer Reviews, including Product Star Ratings, help customers to learn more about the product and decide whether it is the right product for them.

            To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyses reviews to verify trustworthiness.

            Learn more how customers reviews work on Amazon
            Sponsored

            Customers say

            Customers find the moisturizer effective for mature skin, producing noticeable results, and appreciate its soft, smooth texture that easily absorbs into the skin. The product receives positive feedback for its quality and value, though opinions about its thickness are mixed. Several customers report eye irritation when using it.

            Previous slide
            Next slide
            Amazon Customer
            5 out of 5 stars
            A rich, super hydrating moisturiser
            I love this moisturiser, it's rich but absorbs quickly, and isn't greasy at all. Olay is a trusted, established brand and this level of quality is why. I really appreciate that the jar is refillable, which is eco-friendly. The jar is pretty, and it has an inner lid to stop it getting messy inside which is useful. The moisturiser has a light, clean, pleasant scent but it hasn't irritated my sensitive skin. It also doesn't have any synthetic dyes which can irritate sensitive skin. The cream is rich but feels light, absorbs quickly and doesn't feel greasy. A little goes a long way and it leaves my skin feeling smoother, firmer, and super hydrated. Niacinamide is a great ingredient to help with uneven skin tone, redness and anti ageing, along with vitamin E which is a powerful antioxidant. I particularly like that it has an SPF30 UVA and UVB protection, which is so important with facial skincare. Overall I've found this to be a fab moisturiser, it ticks all the boxes for me and doesn't irritate my skin. I think itll be great for younger skin, but especially for more mature skin (30+). I would definitely recommend it. 5*

            Reviews

            Product Summary: Olay Niacinamide Day Face Cream SPF30. Anti-Wrinkle + Age Defying Skincare Moisturiser with Sun Protection, Vitamin E and Anti-Ageing Niacinamide. Renews and Hydrates. Non-Greasy. 50ml

            From Olay

            4.5 out of 5 stars, 564 ratings

            Customer reviews

            50+ bought in past week

            Price

            One-time purchase: £15.00 ( £30.00 / ml)

            Subscribe & Save price (No fees, Cancel anytime): £14.25 ( £28.50 / ml) 5% Savings

            List Price: £15.00

            Additional savings available through Subscribe & Save (No fees, Cancel anytime)

            All prices include VAT.

            Purchasing options

            Other sellers

            Other sellers

            About this Item

            • POWERFUL ANTI-AGEING FORMULATION: This cream features our highest concentration of Niacinamide at 99% purity, along with antioxidant Vitamin E to help combat the visible signs of ageing
            • IMMEDIATE RESULTS: Experience instant long-lasting hydration. In just one day, 93% of users reported smoother-feeling skin.In 14 days skin looks rejuvanated and visibly more even
            • SPF 30 SOLASHEER TECHNOLOGY: Protect your skin from UV rays, the #1 cause of premature ageing, with this lightweight, non-greasy cream. Enjoy SPF30 sun protection without the white cast or sticky residue
            • 24H HYDRATION: Enriched with glycerin to help the skin retain moisture and stay soft, this cream delivers long-lasting hydration
            • DERMATOLOGIST TESTED: this face cream is dermatologist approved by the Skin Health Alliance to defy the visible signs of ageing
            • BEAUTIFUL REFILLABLE GLASS JAR: once your jar is empty, pop out the empty pod and pop in an Olay POP refill

            Product description

            Product Description
            Defy the 10 signs of aging with Olay Regenerist Niacinamide SPF30 moisturiser! Our advanced active firming day moisturiser with SPF 30 delivers transformative (visible) skin results instantly and overtime. It is crafted with Niacinamide at 99% purity, penetrating up to 10 layers deep into skin’s surface and Vitamin E, a proven antioxidant known to combat free-radical damage and help keep skin looking youthful. Experience the power of 24-hour hydration, keeping your skin moisturized throughout the day. In just one day, 93% women noticed smoother skin. Over 14 days, experience a firmer complexion and reduced fine lines. Say goodbye to heavy, greasy face creams and welcome our advanced Olay SolaSheer SPF30 technology: an effective broad-spectrum UVA and UVB protection, shielding your skin from harmful rays, that absorbs effortlessly for a lightweight, non-greasy, non-sticky feel on skin. Our formula is now dermatologist approved by the Skin Health Alliance for its effectiveness in defying visible signs of skin ageing. Upgrade your skincare Routine with our beautiful (and more sustainable) Refillable Glass Jar! Effortlessly pop in and pop out the refillable pods for a delightful and innovative skincare experience.
            Ingredients
            Aqua, Octocrylene, Zea Mays Starch, Homosalate, Niacinamide, Glycerin, Ethylhexyl Salicylate, Butyl Methoxydibenzoylmethane, Dimethicone, Tocopheryl Acetate, Panthenol, Caprylyl Glycol, Dimethiconol, Cetearyl Glucoside, Cetearyl Alcohol, Stearic Acid, Palmitic Acid, Stearyl Alcohol, Cetyl Alcohol, Behenyl Alcohol, Arachidyl Alcohol, Disodium EDTA, PEG-100 Stearate, 1.2-Hexanediol, Sodium Polyacrylate Starch, Phenoxyethanol, Parfum
            Directions
            How to use: smooth evenly over cleansed face and neck. Apply minimum once a day, in the morning.
            Manufacturer Contact Information
            Procter & Gamble UK, Weybridge, Surrey, KT13 0XP
